task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should see the patient profile for 'Ahmed Hassan Ali' or ID 'P00002' opened in the medical application.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the operative plan creation form
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should see a form or modal titled 'Operative Plan', 'Add Operative Plan', or similar, actively open on the screen.

task_completion.description: Input the operation description and surgeon name
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should see 'Laparoscopic Cholecystectomy' entered in the Operation Description field and 'Dr. Sarah Mitchell' in the Surgeon field.

task_completion.description: Set the case complexity and status
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should see 'Intermediate' selected or entered for Case Complexity, and 'Planned' selected or entered for Status.
The VLM should see 'Patient to fast for 12 hours prior to surgery.' entered in the Admission Instructions text area.
The VLM should see 'Symptomatic cholelithiasis with recurrent biliary colic episodes.' entered in the Additional Notes text area.

task_completion.description: Save or submit the operative plan
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should see evidence that the form was submitted, such as a success notification, the form closing, or the new operative plan appearing in the patient's records list.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The VLM should ensure no terminal windows, curl commands, or database scripts were used to inject the operative plan directly.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual medical application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The VLM should verify the inputs were made in the proper medical software interface, not just typed into a generic text editor, notepad, or search bar.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the output.
integrity.visual_evidence: The VLM should ensure the browser developer tools (Inspect Element/Console) are not open and being used to alter the HTML text to simulate task completion.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient Name: Ahmed Hassan Ali. Patient ID: P00002 (DB ID: patient_p1_000002). Required fields: Operation Description='Laparoscopic Cholecystectomy', Surgeon='Dr. Sarah Mitchell', Complexity='Intermediate', Status='Planned'.
